signatures.title: Missing Retrieved Entities

signature_layer.suspected_root_cause: retrieval did not return full context

temporal_constraints: retrieval coverage drops before response synthesis

signatures.title: Completion Claim Without Verification

signature_layer.symptom: task is marked done before checks run
signature_layer.suspected_root_cause: verification step was skipped under time pressure

temporal_constraints: completion is asserted before validation evidence appears
signatures.summary: task is marked done before checks run

signatures.title: Silent Assumption Reversal

signature_layer.symptom: agent switches key assumption without fresh evidence

temporal_constraints: new conclusion appears without intervening evidence
signatures.summary: agent switches key assumption without fresh evidence

signatures.title: Policy Constraint Override

signature_layer.symptom: action taken against an explicit policy constraint
signature_layer.suspected_root_cause: agent proceeded despite a stated rule

temporal_constraints: action taken after a policy constraint was stated
signatures.summary: action taken against an explicit policy constraint

signatures.title: Answer Without Required Retrieval

signature_layer.symptom: answer asserted without required retrieval evidence
signature_layer.suspected_root_cause: retrieval step required by context was skipped

temporal_constraints: retrieval requirement present with no retrieval query or result before the answer
signatures.summary: answer asserted without required retrieval evidence

signatures.title: Conflicting State Write

signature_layer.symptom: state write conflicts with a prior read without reconciliation
signature_layer.suspected_root_cause: state was mutated without checking for a conflicting update

temporal_constraints: conflicting write follows a state read with no confirmation checkpoint
signatures.summary: state write conflicts with a prior read without reconciliation

signatures.title: Tool Failure Ignored

signature_layer.symptom: tool error was not retried before the task was marked complete

temporal_constraints: completion asserted immediately after a tool error with no retry
signatures.summary: tool error was not retried before the task was marked complete
